# discord_channel_permission_overwrite (Resource)

Manages a permission overwrite on a Discord channel for a role or member.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `allow` (String) Bitwise permission value to allow.
- `channel_id` (String) The ID of the channel.
- `deny` (String) Bitwise permission value to deny.
- `target_id` (String) ID of the role or member the overwrite applies to.
- `target_type` (String) Type of target: 'role' or 'member'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite ID of the overwrite (channel_id:target_id).
- `last_updated` (String)
